title: Another Verilator Internal Error for shift by undef value

features.name: shift left by division-by-zero undef
features.description: Code should include a shift left operation where the shift amount is a result of division by zero

features.name: shift left logical by division-by-zero undef
features.description: Code should include a shift left logical operation where the shift amount is a result of division by zero

features.name: cascade shift operators with undef shift amount
features.description: Code should include chained shift operations where the final shift amount is undefined from division by zero
